_notes.note_no_shared_bits: No shared Warrior family marker bits across all verified carrier spells. No exclusions required.

talent_affixes._todo: Armored to the Teeth (3r, tier 1) — Increases AP by 1/2/3 for every 180 armor. Stat conversion, not implementable as SpellMod.

talent_affixes.name: Booming Voice
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[65536,128,0]: OR of BattleShout(6673) mask0 bit16(0x10000=65536)|CommandingShout(469) mask1 bit7(0x80=128). No shared Warrior marker bits. Battle Shout and Commanding Shout duration +30%/rank (DURATION PCT: 30).

talent_affixes._todo: Cruelty (5r, tier 2) — Increases melee crit by 1%/rank. Passive melee stat, not implementable as SpellMod.
Unbridled Wrath (5r, tier 2) — Your melee attacks have a chance to generate extra rage. Proc-based rage generation, not implementable as SpellMod.

talent_affixes.name: Improved Battle Shout
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[65536,0,0]=0x00010000 (mask0 bit16). No shared Warrior marker bits. Battle Shout AP bonus +4%/rank (EFFECT1 PCT: 4).

talent_affixes._todo: Improved Cleave (3r, tier 3) — Increases Cleave bonus damage by 40/80/120%. DAMAGE PCT on Cleave — add after verifying Cleave(845) flags with .spellinfo all 845.

talent_affixes.name: Commanding Presence
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[65536,128,0]: OR of BattleShout(6673) mask0 bit16(0x10000=65536)|CommandingShout(469) mask1 bit7(0x80=128). No shared Warrior marker bits. Battle Shout AP and Commanding Shout max health bonus +5%/rank (EFFECT1 PCT: 5).

talent_affixes.name: Improved Demoralizing Shout
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[131072,0,0]=0x00020000 (mask0 bit17). No shared Warrior marker bits. Demoralizing Shout AP reduction effect +8%/rank (EFFECT1 PCT: 8).

talent_affixes._todo: Dual Wield Specialization (5r, tier 4) — Increases damage dealt by off-hand weapon by 5/10/15/20/25%. Passive off-hand multiplier, not implementable as SpellMod.
Improved Execute (2r, tier 4) — Reduces rage cost of Execute by 2/5. Non-linear (-2r/-5r), not modelable with linear value_per_rank.
Blood Craze (3r, tier 5) — Your melee crits cause you to regenerate 2/4/6% of total health over 6 sec. Proc-based self-heal, not implementable as SpellMod.
Dual Wield Mastery (2r, tier 5) — Increases hit chance while dual wielding by 2/4%. Passive hit stat, not implementable as SpellMod.
Death Wish (1r, tier 6) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
Improved Intercept (2r, tier 6) — Reduces cooldown of Intercept by 3/5 sec. Non-linear (-3s/-5s), not modelable with linear value_per_rank.
Furious Attacks (2r, tier 6) — Your normal melee attacks have a 10/20% chance to reduce healing effects on target. Proc/debuff, not implementable as SpellMod.
Improved Berserker Stance (5r, tier 7) — Increases AP in Berserker Stance by 2/4/6/8/10%. Aura-conditional passive, not implementable as SpellMod.

talent_affixes.name: Improved Whirlwind
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[0,4,0]=mask1 bit2 (0x00000004). No shared Warrior marker bits. Whirlwind cooldown -2s/rank (COOLDOWN FLAT: -2000ms).

talent_affixes._todo: Precision (3r, tier 8) — Increases melee and ranged hit chance by 1/2/3%. Passive hit stat, not implementable as SpellMod.
Flurry (5r, tier 8) — After landing a melee crit, increases attack speed by 10/15/20/25/30% for next 3 swings. Proc-based attack speed, not implementable as SpellMod.
Bloodsurge (3r, tier 9) — Your melee hits have a 7/14/20% chance to make your next Slam instant. Proc-based, not implementable as SpellMod.

Unending Fury (5r, tier 10) — Increases damage of Whirlwind, Slam, and Bloodthirst by 2/4/6/8/10%. DAMAGE PCT on WW|Slam|BT — deferring until Bloodthirst(23881) flags verified with .spellinfo all 23881.
Rampage (1r, tier 10) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
Bloodthirst (1r, tier 11) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
